title: Other way to extend permissions?
excerpt:
I know there are groups and custom permissions that users can handle but is there another way to manage permissions something I didn’t notice in the documentation?

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know there are groups and custom permissions that users can handle but is there another way to manage permissions something I didn’t notice in the documentation?

Also through API, I can see groups like is_guest and is_admin. Suppose the user creates a custom permissions group. Will I be able to handle that through API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mpsujek,

I am not sure I understand your questions.

  1. What do you mean about another way to manage permissions? Which permissions? Which other way are you referring to? Something like doing it via API?

  2. What are you referring to when you say “custom permissions group”?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
